description: A young woman with long wavy brown hair, fair skin with freckles, green eyes, and a joyful smile takes a selfie on rocky coastal cliffs. She wears a sleeveless, v-neck, knee-length green dress with intricate white geometric paisley patterns and small white buttons down the front. Her right arm is extended holding the phone, showing her bare shoulder and arm. The background features bright blue sky, turquoise ocean waves crashing against rugged limestone rocks and cliffs, with distant waves and a hint of a rocky promontory or small island on the horizon. The lighting is bright and sunny, casting natural shadows on the rocks, suggesting midday sun. The composition is a close-up portrait with expansive seascape behind, emphasizing her happy expression against the dramatic natural backdrop.
key_elements: woman with brown hair and green eyes
location_context: Rocky coastal cliffs overlooking the Mediterranean Sea near Gozo, Malta based on visual cues and coordinates.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:14 AM in late July, bright sunny conditions.
